name: Recipe Card
description: Warm kitchen-card look for recipes, ingredient lists, and cooking notes.

preview.sampleText: Cozy card-style layout for ingredients, steps, and timing.

classes.h5: text-base font-semibold mt-4 mb-2 text-[#8a4a2c] uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mt-3 mb-2 text-[#9a5b39] uppercase tracking-wide
classes.img: max-w-full my-5 rounded-lg border border-[#d9b68c] shadow-sm
classes.th: border border-[#e1c6a1] p-2 bg-[#f8e7cc] text-left font-semibold text-[#5d351f]
classes.blockquote: my-5 border-l-4 border-[#d38a3d] bg-[#fff1db] py-2 pl-4 italic text-[#6b4a39]
classes.code: rounded bg-[#f3e4cb] px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-[#5d351f]
classes.pre: my-5 rounded-lg border border-[#e1c6a1] bg-[#fdf3e1] p-4 text-[#4b2f24] overflow-x-auto
